summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard as independent open PRs with no shared canonical. No security-sensitive refs were present. Mutating close, merge, fix, and raise-PR paths are not safe for this job: instant close and low-signal close are disabled, merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked, and several PRs need maintainer proof, product, or technical correctness decisions.

actions.reason: Independent open focused bug-fix PR; keep open for proof/rebase/maintainer review rather than close or merge.
Independent substantial bug-fix PR with linked issue and conflict evidence; keep open.
Independent PR still waiting on behavior proof; keep open.
Independent open PR that may be viable but requires normal maintainer review outside this close-only inventory job.
Independent Slack PR with failed proof and overlap evidence; keep open rather than close.
Maintainer/product decision needed for the feature; this job cannot merge or fix.
Low-signal-looking docs PR, but this job disables low-signal closure; keep open.
Maintainer/product decision is needed on the diagnostic recovery boundary and observability-only scope.
Actionable review-bot findings remain unresolved, and this job cannot push fixes.
Maintainer/product and technical correctness decisions are required; no fix or replacement PR is allowed in this job.

needs_human: #85546 needs maintainer/product acceptance for adding session rename slash commands; checks alone are not enough for this feature.
#85571 needs maintainer judgment on the diagnostic recovery boundary and whether the observability-only revision is acceptable.
#85611 needs maintainer or author follow-up because Codex bot P1 findings remain unresolved and this job cannot fix the branch.
#85671 needs maintainer/product review for linked issue #20756, plus real behavior proof; the contributor branch is not maintainer-editable.
